notes: ## [1.10.1] - 2026-07-23  ### Added - **Custom Application Icon (#265)**: Added custom Draven Spinning Axe app icon design for Windows executable (`.exe`), macOS app bundle (`.icns`), Linux/favicons, and application navigation header logo.  ### Fixed - **Cargo Configuration Warning**: Removed deprecated `http.http2` config setting from `.cargo/config.toml`. - **Tauri v2 Config Validation**: Removed invalid `icon` property from `app.windows[0]` in `tauri.conf.json`.
